MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
DEFT WAS IN BUILDING AT 2PM (SEEN BY DEPT 1 CLERK ON THE 7TH FLOOR), BUT CAME LATE TO DEPT 1. SHE SAID THE CLERK'S OFFICE SENT HER TO DEPT 8. JURY DEMAND IS STRICKEN.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FLANAGAN, CHRISTINA JANE
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUN-03-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT FLANAGAN, CHRISTINA JANE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLANAGAN, CHRISTINA JANE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET #402, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-07-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. IF DEFT VACATES BY 5 PM ON 6-7-96, PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS & DAMAGES. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY; PLTF ENTITLED TO AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $170; COSTS OF $83 & PD DMGS OF $10.67 PER DAY FROM 5/15 THRU 6/7/96. PROPTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/NORMAN/SHULL: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY A.EVJE PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT C. FLANAGAN PRESENT IN PRO- PER. CASE SETTLED; TERMS NOT ON RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED JUDGMENT PURS TO STIPULATION SIGNED BY DEFT. PARTIES INDICATED UNDERSTANDING OF TERMS OF SETTLMNT.
